items.reason: Covers core LogSampler config normalization, request-only derivation, invalid config retention, random threshold decisions, distribution, and concurrent config reads.
Covers LogSampleConfigPb validation/application, disabled pass-through, previous-good retention, proto population, missing config behavior, and derivation semantics.
Covers access/client/request_out sampling rules, request sampled-in forcing, sampled-out guards, fallback Record checks, and logSampled marker formatting.
Covers LOG/PLOG/VLOG macro-level behavior including FATAL bypass, diagnostic supplement sampling, payload skipping, and background-log bypass.
Covers the new 4000 QPS hot-path and access-sampled-out performance contracts introduced by the sampler design.
Covers request sampling state propagation through ZMQ MetaPb including disabled/full/zero-rate behavior and receiver-local decisions.
Adds system coverage for cross-process sampling consistency and worker-to-client config delivery through register/heartbeat.
The PR adds public EmbeddedConfig RequestSampleRate/AccessSampleRate/DiagnosticSampleRate setters, but no test verifies they populate the expected flag names for embedded-worker startup.
